workflow_name: View All Available Line Commands for a Database Object

steps.description: Type option 1 to select DB2 system catalog on the DB2 Admin main menu
Press Enter to navigate to the System Catalog Objects screen
Type option D to select Databases on the System Catalog Objects screen
Type the database name search pattern in the Name filter field to locate the target database
Press Enter to submit the filter and display the matching Databases list
Type the ? line command in the Select field next to the target database entry to request a full listing of all available line commands
Press Enter to open the Line Commands panel showing all available commands for the selected database
Press PF8 to scroll forward to view the next page of line commands
Press PF7 to scroll backward to view the previous page of line commands
Press PF8 to scroll forward through the line commands list
Press PF8 to continue scrolling forward through the line commands list
Press PF8 to continue scrolling forward through the line commands list
Press PF8 to continue scrolling forward through the line commands list
Press PF8 to scroll to the final page of available line commands
Press PF8 to scroll past the last command entry and confirm the end of the list has been reached
Press PF3 to exit the Line Commands panel and return to the Databases list
